quiz.explanation: Carpenter (noun) — A person who makes and repairs wooden objects and structures.

quiz.question: Which word means: "A person who repairs and maintains machinery."?
quiz.explanation: Mechanic (noun) — A person who repairs and maintains machinery.

quiz.question: Which word means: "A person whose job is to join metal parts by heating and fusing them."?
quiz.explanation: Welder (noun) — A person whose job is to join metal parts by heating and fusing them.

quiz.question: Which word means: "A person who works in a mine."?
quiz.explanation: Miner (noun) — A person who works in a mine.
